setup: Hero-aura regime pair, battle 1 of 2: 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry attacker led by Gatot (aura-boosted A/D +481) vs 1 FC1 T6 Marksman defender with ALL hero slots vacant (no Vulcanus aura - MM panels at base loadout). Same troops as the 16:48:11 battle, which differs only by Vulcanus on the defender.

assumptions: Gatot S2 King's Bestowal triggers == battle rounds (Stage-4 verified)

stats_capture.notes: Infantry A/D include Gatot's aura: +301.9/+302.0pp over the same-day no-hero loadout (179.1/179.7); L/H unchanged by the aura

hero_skills.name: Gatot Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: own Infantry Defense buff (Mueller copy level unconfirmed; Alpaca L2 = +12%)

hero_skills.name: King's Bestowal
hero_skills.effect: fires once per attack; grants Infantry a shield with protection = Attack x pct for 1 turn (Alpaca L2 = 12%)

hero_skills.name: Royal Legion
hero_skills.effect: instills fear: -10% enemy Attack, once at battle start (Royal Legion Lv.2 tooltip, Martin 2026-07-18)

stats_capture.notes: MM panels at NO-Vulcanus base loadout; the 16:48 battle's MM panels (1049.5/1039.3/247.2/150.6) minus these = Vulcanus aura +873.3/+873.3/+118.1/+21.6

troop_passives_active.reason: defender is FC1 - not unlocked (FC5 gate)

notes: REGIME PAIR battle 1/2 (with 20260718_164811): identical troops both sides; only difference is Vulcanus present on the defender MM in battle 2. Outcome flips from attacker victory @150 turns (here) to attacker DEFEAT @6 turns (battle 2).
DEFENDER UNIT CONFIRMED by Martin 2026-07-18: naked FC1 T6 Marksman (Alpaca had no heroes assigned in this battle).
Replicates the E-NIF2 pattern: Gatot-led Infantry kills an FC1 T6 MM in 150 turns (E-NIF2: 150 turns exactly, the G_l^MM(T6)=0.0846 source).
Hero-less T6 MM dealt no visible damage to the Gatot Infantry across 150 turns (attacker injured 0) - consistent with the budget-absorb gate (single naked-MM rate << B).
This battle is Martin's Gatot-analog illustration of pressure-test battle B: a T1 Infantry (Gordon-led there, Gatot-led here) beating the naked T6 MM at ~150 turns.
kills read from Battle Details rows (attacker 1 / defender 0), cross-checked by the casualty identity.
